metrics.name: User Base
metrics.description: Number of active users or downloads.
metrics.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, company reports

metrics.name: Features
metrics.description: Range of functionalities offered, such as GPS tracking, workout plans, social integration.

metrics.name: Platform Compatibility
metrics.description: Availability across different operating systems and devices.

metrics.name: User Ratings
metrics.description: Average user ratings on app stores.

metrics.name: Subscription Cost
metrics.description: Pricing for premium features or subscriptions.
